summary: Full end-to-end test of Maa Harsiddhi Darbar Foods restaurant site. Backend /api/menu returns 168 items across 12 categories with valid schema. Frontend loads after loader, hero/nav/menu/gallery/reviews/contact all render. Search, category filter, add-to-cart, cart drawer (+/- qty, remove, total), checkout form, and WhatsApp URL generation (wa.me/919713131389 with order details) all work correctly. Floating WhatsApp button is fixed bottom-right.

minor.issue: server.py initialises Motor/MongoDB client but no endpoint uses it; dead dependency since /api/menu is hardcoded. Will fail at startup if MONGO_URL/DB_NAME are removed.

issues: Offer badge 'Order ₹999 Get 9% Discount' uses animate-pulse continuously which can feel distracting on a premium dark theme
12 category tabs wrap into 2 rows on desktop; consider horizontal scroll or grouping for cleaner premium look
Beverages (Cold Drink, Mineral Water, Lassi, Butter Milk) are grouped under 'Salad' - business categorisation decision but may confuse users

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid="floating-whatsapp-button" to FloatingWhatsApp component for easier testing
(Optional) Rename cart badge testid from 'cart-item-count' to 'cart-badge-count' to avoid prefix collision with 'cart-item-<id>' line-item selectors
(Optional) Remove unused Motor client init in server.py since /api/menu serves hardcoded data
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 265 lines and hardcodes 168 menu items inline - consider moving menu_data to a separate /app/backend/data/menu.json file for maintainability
Menu.js refetches on every mount; consider caching since data is static (low impact)
CartDrawer uses alert() for validation errors (line 24) - replace with inline error UI for premium UX
Hero parallax uses framer-motion useScroll - works without Lenis, confirmed smooth in viewport
All interactive elements correctly expose data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - menu data is hardcoded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_menu_api.py with 8 passing tests. Use BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Frontend cart state may persist across sessions (CartContext) - clear localStorage if doing fresh test. Note: data-testid prefix 'cart-item-' is ambiguous: 'cart-item-count' (nav badge) vs 'cart-item-<id>' (drawer line items). Use 'cart-item-c' or 'cart-item-m' style prefixes to target line items specifically. To verify WhatsApp URL generation, intercept window.open via page.evaluate before clicking place-order-button.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found - all 14 features from the review request verified working end-to-end.
